amaLevelDescriptions.low: Minimal Ama present. Your digestive fire is functioning well. Continue with supportive dietary habits.
amaLevelDescriptions.moderate: Moderate Ama detected. Consider a light diet with warm, cooked foods and digestive spices.
amaLevelDescriptions.high: Significant Ama accumulation. A gentle detox routine with kitchari, warm water, and rest is recommended.

high: Consult a practitioner for personalized plan
